title: WorkerTelemetry
description: Telemetry record for a single worker task execution, capturing cost, progress, and quality signals for accounting.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version pinned to 1. Consumers must reject records with a different version.

taskId.description: Unique identifier for the worker task, matching the heartbeat taskId.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this telemetry record was captured.

issueNumber.description: GitHub issue number this task targets, if applicable.

prNumber.description: GitHub pull request number produced by this task, if applicable.

taskType.description: Type of task from the task contract.

actorRole.description: Role that performed the work, from the task contract rolePacket.

pmPhase.description: Wave or phase identifier for aggregating cost across a planning cycle.

timing.description: Wall-clock and progress timing for the task execution.

elapsedMs.description: Total wall-clock time from task start to telemetry capture, in milliseconds.

softTimeMinutes.description: Budgeted soft time limit from the task contract, for utilization ratio.

hardTimeMinutes.description: Budgeted hard time limit from the task contract.

progressMilestones.description: Ordered list of progress checkpoints recorded during execution.

label.description: Short label for the milestone, e.g. 'files_read', 'tests_started'.

at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the milestone was reached.

detail.description: Optional additional context for the milestone.

tokenUsage.description: LLM token consumption for the task. Source and confidence indicate how values were obtained.

source.description: How token counts were obtained: api_response (from provider), log_parse (parsed from logs), estimate (computed heuristically).

confidence.description: Reliability of the token counts: high (direct API), medium (parsed), low (estimated).

cachedInputTokens.description: Input tokens served from prompt cache, if reported by the provider.

apiCalls.description: Number of LLM API calls made during the task.

estimatedCost.description: Estimated monetary cost of LLM usage for this task.

amountCents.description: Estimated cost in cents (USD). Zero means negligible or unknown.

currency.description: Currency for the cost estimate. Currently only USD.

model.description: LLM model identifier used for pricing, e.g. 'claude-opus-4-7'.

pricingBasis.description: How the pricing was determined: api_list (official rates), estimated, unknown.

changedFiles.description: Actual file change footprint compared against task contract budgets.

count.description: Number of files modified or created.

maxBudget.description: Budgeted maxFiles from the task contract, for utilization comparison.

linesAdded.description: Total lines added across all changed files.

linesRemoved.description: Total lines removed across all changed files.

maxLinesBudget.description: Budgeted maxLinesChanged from the task contract.

validationResults.description: Outcome of each validation command from the task contract.

command.description: The validation command that was executed.

exitCode.description: Process exit code. 0 = pass, non-zero = fail.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration of the command in milliseconds.

qualitySignals.description: Optional quality signals detected during or after execution.

category.description: Failure or quality category, aligned with failure-taxonomy.md.

severity.description: Severity: red (critical, blocks merge), yellow (non-critical, warning).

confidence.description: Confidence in the signal classification: high (3+ patterns), medium (2), low (1).

message.description: Human-readable description of the quality signal.

gateOutcome.description: Final gate result for the task.

passed.description: Whether the task passed all gates and is eligible for merge.

reason.description: If not passed, the primary reason for gate failure.

mainHealthPolicy.description: Main health policy applied, from the task contract.

generatedCodePolicy.description: Generated code policy applied, from the task contract.
